testcase.name: addSectorSuccessfully

failure.message: ❌ Wrong toast message expected [Sector added successfully] but found [Add Done]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: ❌ Wrong toast message expected [Sector added successfully] but found [Add Done] at tests.DoneProject.sectors.AddSectorTest.addSectorSuccessfully(AddSectorTest.java:43) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 34 stack frames
